ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Price of the last trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price data was last updated */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price (accounting for splits and dividends) */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was last updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the economic indicator (e.g., daily, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., economic, corporate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., quarterly earnings, annual report) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the financial report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the full financial report file */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported in the financial report */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income reported in the financial report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of market event (e.g., earnings call, merger announcement) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument affected by the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the event on the financial instrument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of user preference (e.g., language, theme) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the user preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default_role" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
